message:
test(hook): fix compilation detection test for mock mode behavior

Updates test_compilation_detected to properly test the mock execution path.

Previously, the test was incorrectly asserting that the hook would ALLOW
local execution, with a comment saying "remote execution not implemented".
But with the mock mode fully functional, the expected behavior is:

1. Mock mode intercepts the compilation command
2. Remote "execution" succeeds (mocked)
3. Hook correctly DENIES local execution (since remote handled it)

Changes:
- Enable mock mode via set_mock_enabled_override(Some(true)) at test start
- Update assertion to expect deny (not allow) after successful remote compile
- Reset mock override at test end to avoid polluting other tests
- Update comment to accurately describe current behavior

This brings the test in line with the actual mock infrastructure that
was previously added but not properly exercised in this test case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
